allow: Bash(python -c "from docx import Document; print\('python-docx available'\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import PyPDF2; r=PyPDF2.PdfReader\('doc/泰国7天6晚旅游.pdf'\); print\('\\n'.join\(p.extract_text\(\) for p in r.pages[:3]\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import pdfplumber; pdf=pdfplumber.open\('doc/泰国7天6晚旅游.pdf'\); [print\(p.extract_text\(\)\) for p in pdf.pages[:3]]")
Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\); const pdf=require\('pdf-parse'\); pdf\(fs.readFileSync\('doc/泰国7天6晚旅游.pdf'\)\).then\(d=>console.log\(d.text.substring\(0,3000\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('\\n'.join\(v['version'] for v in d.get\('versions',[]\)[:5]\)\)")
